Done. Here is what was found and done:

- `website.service` existed only at `/home/clungus/.config/systemd/user/website.service`. It was not tracked in `claude-config`, so there was nothing to `git rm`.
- The unit file was deleted directly.
- `systemctl --user daemon-reload` was run; systemd now confirms "Unit website.service could not be found."
